transcript: Speaker A: Every champion starts somewhere. Usually a little unsure, a little unprepared. The first attempts are never perfect. But showing up, that's what matters. Athletes practice for years for moments that last seconds. What takes seconds to witness takes a lifetime to prepare. No dream goes global without practice and determination. Speaker B: Duolingo English Test. Proud supporters of dreamers and doers!
on_screen_text:
NEERAJ CHOPRA CLASSIC 2025
Every champion starts somewhere.
Usually a little unsure, a little unprepared.
The first attempts are never perfect.
But showing up, that's what matters.
Athletes practice for years
for moments that last seconds.
What takes seconds to witness
takes a lifetime to prepare.
No dream goes global
without practice and determination.
duolingo english test
Proud supporters of dreamers and doers!
Dream. Practice. Win.
duolingo english test

Based on everyday English
Take unlimited free practice tests
summary: The ad features Indian athletes, including Neeraj Chopra, alongside the Duolingo mascot, drawing a parallel between the dedication required for athletic success and the preparation needed for academic/language goals. It promotes the Duolingo English Test as a tool for global dreams, highlighting its acceptance by over 5900 universities. The call to action encourages viewers to take unlimited free practice tests.
